title: Greenpill 2026 Thesis
dek: The approved Paragraph preview frames 2026 around depth, Garden incubation, knowledge gardens, commitment pooling, sustainable funding, and grounded tooling research.
excerpt: A source-backed 2026 thesis for Greenpill's Garden model, Knowledge Garden direction, Sarafu/Regen Reservoir experiments, sustainable funding, and Writers Guild research.
body:
The approved 2026 thesis preview is editorial direction, not a new operational owner model.

The source introduces Greenpill Garden as a five-month incubation program launched at DevConnect and running through April 2026, with Theory of Change, coherent design strategy, CIDS, protocol, and tooling phases. It also points toward Knowledge Gardens, commitment pooling through Sarafu and Regen Reservoir, sustainable funding via Octant, Giveth, Artizen, Gardens, and Public Goods Staking, plus the Writers Guild and Carbon Copy Web3 Tooling Series.

For the website, this material should deepen the Garden and Library surfaces while leaving Garden, Knowledge Garden, Sarafu/Regen Reservoir, and Bread/Regen Coordination editorial-only until a separate operational ownership decision is made.

## Sources

- S071: https://paragraph.com/@greenpill/preview/rN8MvIeOa4RGvE8kJN9L
author: Greenpill Network research
